data.title: A whale deposited 4.4 million USDC into HyperLiquid, shorting ETH with 20x leverage and XRP with 8x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On May 14, according to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 4.4 million USDC into HyperLiquid, opened a short position on ETH with 20x leverage, and opened a short position on XRP with 8x leverage.

data.title: VeChain’s Bold Vision to Tokenize Human Behavior
data.description:
Forget NFTs and DeFi hype (it probably doesn’t take much to forget NFTs these days). VeChain is turning its focus to everyday actions—recycling a can, driving an electric car—and putting them on-chain. Speaking in Toronto, CEO Sunny Lu introduced a plan to measure and reward sustainable behavior through blockchain infrastructure, blending real-world impact with digital.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/altcoins/vechains-bold-vision-to-tokenize-human-behavior/

data.title: Saudi Telecom and Oracle Sign Major Cloud Solutions Agreement
data.description: According to PANews, Saudi Telecom has entered into a significant agreement with Oracle, valued at 2 billion riyals, to enhance cloud solutions. This collaboration aims to bolster technological infrastructure and improve digital services within the region. The partnership reflects a growing trend of investment in cloud technologies, as companies seek to optimize operations and drive innovation. The agreement is expected to have a substantial impact on the digital landscape, offering advanced solutions and services to meet increasing demands.

data.title: Bitget Wallet and Reserve launch DTF index fund trading and $200,000 reward event
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet and decentralized asset issuance platform Reserve jointly launched an exclusive reward event, providing users with DTF (Decentralized Token Folios) on-chain index fund investment entry in the Bitget Wallet App, allowing users to configure a package of assets with one token, improving overall investment efficiency and risk management capabilities. The event will be held from May 14 to June 14 at 17:00 (UTC+8), with a total prize pool of up to 200,000 USDC. Users can share the prize pool or participate in the lottery by trading or holding DTF. The DTF launched by Reserve is an on-chain index fund that allows users to invest in multiple digital asset portfolios with a single token, covering popular tracks such as AI, DeFi, and RWA.

data.title: Web3 tourism ecosystem platform Coinsidings launches the fifth round of CSS IPOs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 tourism ecological platform Coinsidings announced the official launch of the fifth round of CSS option tokens, with the participation threshold of locking 50,000 AIA chain tokens.
It is reported that CSS, as the core equity certificate of the platform, can not only participate in the main network token casting and tourism consumption exchange, but also have future dividends and governance rights. The release ratio of this round is still 10% immediate release + 90% 10-month linear unlocking. The unlocking cycle is significantly shortened compared to the original plan of 18 months, and the liquidity is better.
Coinsidings officials said that CSS will be bound to more high-quality RWA projects in the future, and gradually open up diversified application scenarios such as DeFi staking, DAO voting, and ecological dividends, to help early shareholders build a decentralized global travel ecosystem and share the value-added dividends of on-chain assets.
New issue time: 2025.5.14 14:00 — 2025.5.17 14:00 (UTC+8)
Participation rules: Lock 50,000 AIA
Release plan: Release 10% after the end, and 10% every 30 days thereafter, and unlock linearly within 10 months

data.title: CertiK Secures Ethereum Foundation Grants for zkEVM Research
data.description:
According to Foresight News, security audit firm CertiK has announced that it has received two research grants from the Ethereum Foundation for the first quarter of 2025. These grants are primarily focused on the formal verification of zkEVM, a technology aimed at enhancing Ethereum's scalability through zero-knowledge proofs.

CertiK's advanced formal verification technology, designed to handle complex zero-knowledge proof systems, provides robust security support for Ethereum's scalability strategy. This technology has already been applied to various Web3 projects, including zkWasm, TON main chain contracts, Cosmos SDK, Ant Group's HyperEnclave TEE, and Asterinas OS.

zkEVM, or zero-knowledge Ethereum Virtual Machine, represents an innovation in blockchain technology, utilizing zero-knowledge proofs to achieve scalability for Ethereum.

data.title: BSC Foundation purchased another $25,000 worth of CGPT and SIREN two days later
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ai Yi’s monitoring, the BSC Foundation address purchased 25,000 US dollars of CGPT at an average price of 0.1398 US dollars and 25,000 US dollars of SIREN at an average price of 0.1544 US dollars two days apart.

data.title: Retail Investors Show Renewed Interest in Bitcoin
data.description: According to BlockBeats, CryptoQuant analyst Oro Crypto has observed a notable increase in retail investor activity in Bitcoin. Since April 28, when the trend shifted positively, the buying volume from small investors has risen by 3.40% as of May 13. This indicates a significant resurgence of interest among retail traders.

data.title: Bitget provides public welfare network services to remote areas through the Starlink project
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget announced that it will improve the network infrastructure in remote areas of the Philippines through the satellite Internet deployed by the Starlink Project. The first coverage points include Espoir School of Life and Barangay Pitogo on Siargao Island.
The plan introduces Starlink satellite equipment to provide free high-speed Internet for six months to local areas, aiming to improve local problems such as insufficient educational resources and poor communications. Bitget said that in the future, it will further provide skills training and resource support for local students and women's cooperatives through its "Blockchain4Youth" and "Blockchain4Her" projects.
Previously, due to infrastructure limitations, local residents mainly relied on microwave radio frequency communications, with frequent network interruptions and slow speeds, making it difficult to meet basic needs such as online learning and telemedicine. This satellite network access will improve the above problems and provide more stable information services to the local area.

data.title: US Slashes Tariffs on Small Parcels from China in Trade Reset
data.description:
Catenaa, Wednesday, May 14, 2025-President Donald Trump on Monday cut tariffs on small parcels from Chinese retailers like Shein and Temu, easing a short-lived duty hike that had threatened to disrupt low-cost e-commerce flows between the world’s two largest economies. The White House announced that tariffs on packages valued at $800 or less arriving from […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/us-slashes-tariffs-on-small-parcels-from-china-in-trade-reset
